topic.what: Adversarial stage-gated multi-agent methodology filtering false positives in LLM-assisted vulnerability discovery
topic.how: Four-stage pipeline combining Stratified Context Hunting, adversarial kill mandates, Cross-Model Critic, context asymmetry, and mandatory empirical validation gates
topic.why_matters: LLM-generated reports cause maintainer denial-of-service (curl bounty closed, HackerOne paused); precision crisis undermines credibility for real findings

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of candidates eliminated before disclosure to reduce false positives
characteristics.evidence: ~135 of ~171 candidates killed; 25 of 30 on consolidated-protocol subset
characteristics.context: Retrospective attribution to evolved protocol; prospective subset is monotonic single-wave

characteristics.what_itasures: Number of CVEs discovered and accepted
characteristics.vs_baseline: 0 CVEs from 80+ agents in initial OpenSSL campaign
characteristics.context: Externally validated by CVE assignment and maintainer merge

characteristics.what_it_measures: Stage A elimination rate of initial candidates
characteristics.evidence: Stage A killed ~63% of entrants; Stage B killed ~42% of survivors
characteristics.context: Retrospective attribution; leave-one-out ablation not performed

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of additional kills attributed to cross-family review
characteristics.evidence: CMC killed ~5 candidates (~3% of all kills) that survived earlier stages; found correctness issues in 3/19 (16%) same-family-approved fixes in libfuse
characteristics.context: Libfuse campaign specifics; wider evaluation is future work

characteristics.what_it_measures: LLM API cost per CVE discovered
Bugs found by cross-family review that same-family review missed
characteristics.evidence: Codex (different family) found 3 bugs that Claude-family agents missed
characteristics.context: Single campaign; wider validation is future work

novelty: hard adversarial kill mandate architecture (destruction not convergence)
Stratified Context Hunting with wave-based re-seeding
Cross-Model Critic for correlated training-data error detection
mandatory empirical validation gate (killed Bleichenbacher false positive 80+ agents endorsed)
unanimity-as-warning pattern recognition (shared priors manufacture consensus)
open_problems: Ablation studies to isolate individual mechanism contributions
Cross-domain transfer to structurally dissimilar codebases
Automated resurrection agent after unanimous kills
Decentralized peer-debate variants without central orchestrator
Formal validation of cross-model critic effectiveness across multiple domains
